betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The Inscriber stamps Processor Presses into Pure Crystals to create Printed Circuits and finished Processors.

Three slot types exist:
Top/bottom: Press or input material
Middle: the item being processed

An Inscriber requires AE/t power to operate. It accepts input from any side and outputs from any side — use buses for automation.

Warning: Each Inscriber handles one recipe type. Build separate Inscribers for Calculation, Engineering, Logic, and Silicon recipes for throughput.
